# Usage Example:

**Query with Domain Model File:**
> Use domain-model-parser skill to parse the domain model markdown file and extract structured metadata JSON from "/sanjel/PRG/orgModel/01 - Program Request Management/domain-model.md".
**带领域模型文件的提问：**
> 使用 domain-model-parser skill，解析领域模型 markdown 文件并从 "/sanjel/PRG/orgModel/01 - Program Request Management/domain-model.md" 提取结构化元数据 JSON。
